title: aster fluminensis
intro: Aster fluminensis, a flowering plant species native to Brazil, belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as the Brazilian aster or Flor de Papel. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aster fluminensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
